name: NEW_ENTRANT_COMPANIES_BY_ORIGIN_AFTER_YEAR
description: For an origin/country, list companies whose first filing year is after the cutoff and show their main target pairs.
cypher: MATCH (o:Origin {name:$origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year WHERE first_year > $year MATCH (a)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p2:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair) WITH a.name AS company, first_year, tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p2) AS patent_count ORDER BY company, patent_count DESC RETURN company, first_year, target_pair, patent_count LIMIT 50;
